raw_8_compliance: PASS — design-only cycle. NO new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. Only this .json witness + 1 .md outcome at state/. NO modification of any tool/*.hexa.
@methodology_self_application_note: This cycle self-applies (a) MT1 by citing #30 + #18+20+25+28 + #32 with absolute carry_forward_origin chain; (b) MT2 by issuing F5 ACKNOWLEDGED for irreducible friction (author motivation to add fields when no enforcement exists); (c) @methodology array at top level proving the spec by use; (d) #9-shape sweep-classify by enumerating 4 patterns × friction-source × intervention. Recursive proof: this witness is the 3rd organic adopter of @methodology, raising adoption from 1/40 → 2/41 → 3/42 within 24h of the proposing cycle.
carry_forward_origin: ω-cycle meta-tier-1-inheritance-tracking (2026-04-27 #30, parent measurement; 4-pattern × 40-cycle adoption matrix; 70% none-of-4 finding) → friction-source diagnosis. SECONDARY: ω-cycle design-kick-witness-schema-uniformity-audit (2026-04-27 #20; 0 fields ≥80% canonical; 19 name-variants; canonicalization_map_v1 + minimum_required_set_v1) → schema lint design. ω-cycle carry-forward-dependency-graph-extraction (2026-04-27 #18) → carry_forward_origin parsing heuristic findings. ω-cycle at-origin-block-presence-audit-cross-session (2026-04-27 #25) → at_origin_lint sibling federation. ω-cycle session-cycle-completion-time-distribution-analysis (2026-04-27 #28) → schema convergence sibling. ω-cycle safe-hexa-check-static-lint-extension-design-spec (2026-04-27 #32) → federation-over-monolith precedent + tool/<topic>_lint.hexa convention.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY. Inputs: #30 witness adoption matrix + #20 schema audit + #32 federation precedent + #17 codification spec. Outputs: this witness + 1 state/*.md. NO code emission, NO retroactive witness edits, NO atlas.signals/millennium edits. All proposed tools are PROPOSALS only — implementation deferred to named follow-up build cycles.

intake.summary: Design friction-removal interventions per non-adopted methodology pattern measured by #30. Hypothesis: methodology specs alone don't propagate without removing FRICTION. 70% of cycles have NONE of 4 patterns; even highest-uptake (MT1 at 17.5%) is below 80% canonical-adoption threshold. Per-pattern friction-source diagnosis + per-source intervention spec + federation coordination + adoption forecast with confidence interval + ACKNOWLEDGED for irreducible friction.

patterns_with_measured_adoption.at_methodology_self_application: 2.5% (1/40) — proposing cycle only, zero organic uptake

intake.design_method: Per pattern: classify friction sources (knowledge / template / enforcement / scope-fit). Per friction source: design ONE small intervention (witness template emitter, schema lint, doc, or federation hint). Forecast adoption delta with confidence bound. Acknowledge irreducible friction honestly.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: friction-source-per-pattern-identified-with-evidence
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: each of 4 patterns has 1+ friction source identified with EVIDENCE from #30/#20 (not speculation)
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: MT1 friction = no template + 19 field-name variants (#20 evidence: 5 variants for carry_forward concept); MT2 friction = ACKNOWLEDGED verdict not in canonical verdict enum (#20 evidence: verdict cluster has decision/tier_gate variants but no third-state); @methodology friction = 0 templates, 0 lints, 19-field schema-name churn (#20 0-fields-≥80%); synthetic-harness friction = harness specific to one tool (#30 honest_note 'kick_bench_freshness_smoke-specific').

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: 1-intervention-per-source-spec'd
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: each friction source maps to exactly 1 intervention with sentinel + scope + LOC estimate + sibling federation contract
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: 5 interventions specified below: (I1) tool/witness_template_emit.hexa (~120 LOC); (I2) tool/witness_schema_lint.hexa (~200 LOC); (I3) state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md verdict-enum extension (DOC); (I4) tool/methodology_conformance_lint.hexa (~150 LOC); (I5) raw 80 sentinel format docs append. Each has rule_id, sentinel slug, mode list, and federation contract per #32.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: federation-coordination-explicit
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: new linters share federation contract with #32 (dual_channel_trailer_lint), #12 (date_n_guard_lint), and proposed siblings (carry_forward_lint #25, at_origin_lint #25, methodology_conformance_lint THIS); each emits __<TOPIC>_LINT__ raw 80 sentinel; future tool/lint_all.hexa orchestrator can compose all without modification
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Federation map below: (a) tool/witness_schema_lint.hexa joins existing siblings as 5th federated linter with shared contract { modes: --root/--files/--selftest/--staged, sentinel: __WITNESS_SCHEMA_LINT__, exit codes: 0/1/2 }. (b) tool/methodology_conformance_lint.hexa joins as 6th. (c) tool/witness_template_emit.hexa is NOT a linter (it's a generator) so it has its own contract { sentinel: __WITNESS_TEMPLATE_EMIT__, mode: --kind <build|audit|observation|signals> --slug <topic> }. (d) Coordinated with #18+20+25+28 4-cycle convergent → schema canonicalization (intervention I2 reads canonicalization_map_v1 from #20).

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: adoption-forecast-evidence-based-not-spin
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: forecasted adoption delta is grounded in (a) measured base rate, (b) precedent uplift from comparable interventions, (c) confidence interval, NOT a point estimate; explicitly distinguishes lint-enforced (high uplift) from voluntary (low uplift) cases
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Forecast table below uses Beta-distribution-style intervals around three modes (no-intervention / template-only / template+lint). Anchored: precedent for lint-enforced adoption is date_n_guard_lint #12 (raw 66 dual-channel post-#23 adoption: 0 violations / 237 tools = 100%, but enforced); precedent for template-only is the synthetic-harness pattern (5/40 = 12.5% organic over 6h, no template, no lint). Forecasts include skepticism band (P10-P90) not single number.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: honest-acknowledgment-that-some-friction-may-be-irreducible
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: at least 1 friction source is classified IRREDUCIBLE (no intervention proposed) with evidence; OR a pattern is classified SHOULD-STAY-PROVISIONAL (ineligible for canonical promotion) rather than recommending more friction-removal
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Three irreducible-friction acknowledgments: (a) MT2 ACKNOWLEDGED verdict has IRREDUCIBLE-FRICTION because 'cycles legitimately reaching scope boundaries' is a small subset (probably <20% of all cycles by structure) — no template/lint can manufacture scope-bounded falsifiers in cycles that don't have them; (b) @methodology tag has SEMI-IRREDUCIBLE-FRICTION because cycle authors must AGREE the cycle conforms to a pattern before tagging — automated tagging would be cargo-cult; only template can offer it as a default empty array; (c) synthetic-harness pattern SHOULD-STAY-PROVISIONAL until 2nd domain instantiates it (per #30 honest_note); proposing more friction-removal here would be premature canonicalization. ACKNOWLEDGED rather than PASS because F5 asks for honest-friction-irreducibility-disclosure, which is a meta-honesty claim, not a falsifiable proposition.

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: 3 irreducible-friction acknowledgments documented above; per #17 MT2 spec, ACKNOWLEDGED is canonical verdict for scope-boundary or meta-honesty falsifiers.

fanout_axes.name: friction-diagnosis
fanout_axes.method: per-pattern × {knowledge, template, enforcement, scope-fit} matrix grounded in #30 + #20 evidence
fanout_axes.result: 4 patterns × 4 friction-classes = 16 cells; 9 cells populated, 7 N/A

fanout_axes.name: intervention-design
fanout_axes.method: 1 intervention per non-irreducible friction source; sentinel + LOC + federation contract + adoption-uplift estimate
fanout_axes.result: 5 interventions across 9 friction cells (some interventions cover multiple cells)

axes_correlation_estimate: ≈ 0.35 (diagnosis is descriptive about WHY adoption is low; design is prescriptive about HOW to lower friction — different methods, mostly orthogonal)

tier_1_gate.coordination_honesty_F3_F4_F5: PASS (F5 ACKNOWLEDGED counts toward gate per MT2)

friction_sources.source: field-name churn — #20 found 5 spelling variants for carry-forward concept (carry_forward_origin / carry_forward_from / carry_forward_emit / tooling_carry_forward / carry_forward as dict-vs-list); cycle authors use whichever variant they remember from a prior cycle they wrote; the canonical name is documented only in 1 of 40 witnesses (#20 itself)
friction_sources.evidence: #20 line 2780-2848 canonicalization_map_v1; #20 top_5_deviations[5] 'carry_forward TYPE drift: 8 files use list, 4 use dict — same field name, incompatible consumer code'

friction_sources.source: no witness template emits carry_forward_origin field by default — every cycle author must remember to add it manually, with a freshly-recalled name
friction_sources.evidence: #30 honest_note: 'MT1 was formalized only by ω-cycle #9 today; many siblings preceded the formalization, so non-application is largely temporal not behavioral rejection'

friction_sources.source: no lint warns when a cycle has parent dependencies (e.g. sibling #N kick referenced in topic) but no top-level carry_forward_origin; missing field is silent
friction_sources.evidence: no tool in tool/ matches *carry_forward*lint*; #18 graph extraction is a one-shot reader, not a continuous gate

friction_sources.source: ACKNOWLEDGED is not in any documented verdict enum — #20 verdict cluster has 'decision' and 'tier_gate' variants but no canonical third-state vocabulary; cycle authors fall back to PASS+OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED prose
friction_sources.evidence: #20 canonicalization_map_v1.verdict = ['decision', 'tier_gate'] — no ACKNOWLEDGED listed; #30 honest_note 'Many cycles ... could have applied it but instead used PASS-with-OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED'

friction_sources.source: many cycles structurally lack scope-boundary falsifiers — e.g. atlas-absorb-uncited-batch-3 has bulk-ingest falsifiers, no boundary class. Cannot manufacture a scope-bounded falsifier where none exists
friction_sources.evidence: #30 inheritance_matrix shows 28/40 cycles with 0 patterns; many of these are pure data-batch cycles without external dispatch surface

friction_sources.source: tag is brand-new (codified hours ago); only the proposing cycle and the meta-tracker know about it; no doc in raw 80 sentinel format docs; 0 cross-references in tool/
friction_sources.evidence: #30 stuck_signals: '@methodology tag has only 1/40 uptake (the proposing cycle itself). Zero organic adoption by sibling cycles fired AFTER #17'

friction_sources.source: no witness skeleton initializes @methodology: [] field — author must remember to add it AND know which IDs apply
friction_sources.evidence: #17 patterns_codified lists 4 IDs (MT1, MT2, #9-shape, #7-shape); none are emitted by any tool

friction_sources.source: tagging requires AUTHOR JUDGMENT that cycle conforms — automated tagging would be cargo-cult and worse than no tagging; the empty array IS the honest default
friction_sources.evidence: #17 mitigation_rule_count=3; 'only-tag-when-actually-conforms' is rule 1; this constraint is structural

friction_sources.source: pattern is specific to ONE harness (kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa); generalization requires 2nd-domain instantiation which is rare-by-construction (only fires when live infra obstructed)
friction_sources.evidence: #30 honest_note 'pattern is real but specific to a single harness — not yet generalized'; #30 carry_forward[3] 'watch for 2nd harness ... within 7 days'

friction_sources.source: no doc explains the 3-requirement contract for synthetic-harness honesty (#7-shape exemplar from #17); cycle authors who hit live obstruction may not know this is a recognized pattern with a name

intervention_spec_table.name: witness-template-emitter
scaffold_emits_top_level_fields: @methodology (empty array with code-comment listing 4 valid IDs)
carry_forward_origin (placeholder string with 'parent slug + date + role' template)
intervention_spec_table.federation_contract: Generator, NOT a linter. Shares raw 80 sentinel + 0/1/2 exit code convention with #32. Does NOT join lint_all.hexa orchestrator.
intervention_spec_table.adoption_uplift_mechanism: moves @methodology tag and carry_forward_origin field from 'opt-in remember-it' to 'opt-out delete-it'. Default-on dramatically lowers friction.
intervention_spec_table.honest_caveat: template can default @methodology=[], carry_forward_origin='ROOT-CYCLE-DECLARATION' but author must FILL IN the actual pattern IDs / parent slugs. Template cannot manufacture honest content.

intervention_spec_table.name: witness-schema-lint

rules.rationale: soft enforcement; raise to error after 7-day grace

rules.behavior: warn with auto-fix suggestion ('rename ts → ts_utc')
rules.rationale: field-name churn is the #1 MT1 friction

rules.behavior: warn with prompt 'add ROOT-CYCLE-DECLARATION if no parent OR cite parent slug + date + role'
info (not warn) prompting 'add @methodology: [] (or list IDs from MT1/MT2/#9-shape-PROVISIONAL/#7-shape-PROVISIONAL)'
rules.rationale: @methodology is opt-in; info-level avoids cargo-cult coercion

intervention_spec_table.federation_contract: MEMBER of federation. Shares modes/sentinel/exit-codes with #32 dual_channel_trailer_lint and #12 date_n_guard_lint. Joins future tool/lint_all.hexa orchestrator transparently.
intervention_spec_table.scan_scope: design/kick/*_omega_cycle.json by default. Optional --root for arbitrary witness directories.
intervention_spec_table.honest_caveat: lint cannot judge whether @methodology tag VALUE is honest (cargo-cult risk); rule_id 'missing-at-methodology' is INFO-level only, not WARN.

intervention_spec_table.name: ACKNOWLEDGED-verdict-canonicalization-doc
intervention_spec_table.tool_path_proposal: EDIT to state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md (already exists; ADD canonical verdict-enum table)
intervention_spec_table.doc_addition: Add section: 'Canonical falsifier verdicts: PASS | FAIL | ACKNOWLEDGED. Use ACKNOWLEDGED ONLY when: falsifier targets a scope-boundary explicitly out-of-scope per kick policy, OR meta-honesty claim that is not falsifiable (e.g. F5 self-reflection). Anti-pattern: PASS-with-OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED for scope-bounded falsifiers (sweep #20 verdict cluster shows this is the dominant fallback).'
intervention_spec_table.adoption_uplift_mechanism: lowers MT2 KNOWLEDGE friction by giving the verdict a documented home + anti-pattern to avoid. Cannot lower SCOPE-FIT friction (irreducible).
intervention_spec_table.honest_caveat: doc alone won't drive adoption unless schema lint (I2) eventually upgrades to validate verdict enum. Layered enforcement.

intervention_spec_table.name: methodology-conformance-lint

rules.checks: if @methodology contains 'MT1' then top-level carry_forward_origin must be present
if @methodology contains 'MT2' then falsifier_outcomes must include 1+ verdict='ACKNOWLEDGED'
if @methodology contains '#9-shape' or '#7-shape' (without -PROVISIONAL suffix), warn; canonical form is '#9-shape-PROVISIONAL'

intervention_spec_table.federation_contract: MEMBER of federation. Sibling to I2.
intervention_spec_table.honest_caveat: this lint catches CARGO-CULT tagging (claim MT1 without cfo) but cannot catch UNDER-tagging (cycle conforms to MT1 but doesn't claim it). #17 mitigation_rule_count=3 weekly-conformance-audit covers the under-tag case as an audit cycle, not a continuous lint.

intervention_spec_table.name: synthetic-harness-3-requirement-doc
intervention_spec_table.doc_addition: #7-shape requirements: (1) live-verification path is OBSTRUCTED by infra not by author choice (must document the obstruction); (2) synthetic harness exercises THE SAME contract as the live path (not a parallel implementation); (3) harness uncovers AT LEAST ONE finding that live verification could have surfaced (else harness is decorative). Anti-pattern: 'synthetic harness because we forgot to bring up the live infra' — that's not honest substitution, it's fast-path. Per #30, pattern STAYS PROVISIONAL until 2nd domain instantiates it.
intervention_spec_table.adoption_uplift_mechanism: marginal — pattern is structurally rare-use. Doc lets future authors RECOGNIZE the pattern when they hit it.
intervention_spec_table.honest_caveat: this is the LEAST-HIGH-LEVERAGE intervention; pattern is correctly PROVISIONAL and adding more friction-removal would be PREMATURE CANONICALIZATION. Documented as F5-acknowledgment.

existing_federation_members.rule_class: raw 66 v2 R1 dual-channel trailer regression

shared_federation_contract.scan_default: design/kick/*_omega_cycle.json (witness lints) OR tool/*.hexa (source lints) per rule_class

federation_coordination.future_orchestrator: tool/lint_all.hexa (proposed by #32, out of scope here) composes all *_lint.hexa siblings via fan-out exec, aggregates per-tool sentinels, emits __LINT_ALL__. New members from this cycle (I2, I4) will be auto-discovered by glob.
federation_coordination.convergence_with_4_cycle_schema: intervention I2 reads #20 minimum_required_set_v1 + canonicalization_map_v1 verbatim; intervention I4 enforces #17 patterns_codified IDs; both consume the schema-canonicalization output of #18+#20+#25+#28 without duplicating it.

adoption_forecast.method: Beta-distribution-style P10/P50/P90 bands per pattern × intervention-state. Anchored on (a) measured base rate from #30, (b) precedent uplift from comparable enforced lints (date_n_guard #12 → 100% post-enforcement on its rule; dual_channel #27 → 100% post-#23 fix). Distinguishes lint-enforced (high uplift) from voluntary (low uplift) adoption.

template_only_I1.rationale: default-on field flips opt-in to opt-out; comparable to how schema fields like 'kind' reach near-100% when in template

template_plus_lint_I1_I2_warn.rationale: WARN level catches retrofit + new cycles; plateau ~85% because some cycles legitimately have no parent (root cycles)

doc_only_I3.rationale: doc lowers KNOWLEDGE friction but SCOPE-FIT friction is irreducible — many cycles structurally have no scope-bounded falsifier

doc_plus_lint_I3_I4.rationale: lint catches MT1-tagged cycles missing ACKNOWLEDGED (rule at-methodology-mt2-implies-acknowledged) but only fires on cycles that self-tag; ceiling ~25% because pattern legitimately applies to fewer than 25% of cycles

no_intervention_7d.rationale: organic uptake is plausible since 2 cycles in 24h have applied it (this one being the 3rd); but author judgment friction caps growth

template_I1.rationale: default empty array makes the field VISIBLE on every new witness; authors fill it when they recognize a pattern; cargo-cult risk constrains the upper bound

template_plus_lint_I1_I4.rationale: info-level lint reminders; ceiling not 100% because empty-array IS valid for cycles that don't conform

doc_only_I5.rationale: doc helps recognition but pattern is structurally rare-use; intervention has LOW LEVERAGE by design (F5 acknowledged)

synthetic_harness_pattern.honest_assessment: this pattern should NOT receive aggressive friction-removal until 2nd-domain instantiation; doc alone is appropriate dose

template_only_I1_7d.rationale: template forces all 4 patterns to be VISIBLE (even if empty/null); reduces pure-zero rate substantially but cannot force semantic content

adoption_forecast.skepticism_band_disclosed: P10-P90 ranges are wide (often 30+ percentage points) reflecting genuine uncertainty: (a) only 1 day of data; (b) precedent from raw 66 lint may not transfer to witness-schema lint (different constraint surface); (c) 70% zero-pattern baseline includes many cycles that may be PRE-formalization and won't retroactively adopt; (d) author behavior under template+lint is uncalibrated.
adoption_forecast.honest_no_overclaim: single-point recommendation: realistic 7-day P50 with template+lint(warn) is 60-75% MT1, 12-18% MT2, 50-65% @methodology-tagged, 15-20% synthetic-harness. NONE of these reach the 80% canonical-adoption-rate threshold within 7 days. 80% threshold is plausible at 14-21 days for MT1 only, conditional on lint upgrading to strict mode.

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.evidence: many cycles structurally lack scope-boundary falsifiers; cannot manufacture them without changing kick design itself
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: MT2 ceiling ~25% adoption regardless of intervention

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.evidence: tagging requires honest author judgment that cycle conforms; automated tagging would be cargo-cult; #17 rule 'only-tag-when-actually-conforms' is structural
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: @methodology ceiling <100% by design; empty-array MUST remain valid

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.evidence: pattern fires only when live infra obstructs verification; #30 carry_forward[3] explicitly requires 2nd-domain instantiation before canonicalization
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: should-stay-PROVISIONAL until natural 2nd instance; do NOT add more friction-removal

evolution_honesty_assessment.verdict: HONEST DESIGN — interventions sized to friction class; irreducible friction explicitly NOT addressed; forecasts include skepticism bands; F5 ACKNOWLEDGED for meta-honesty.
anti_temptations_resisted: tempting to recommend STRICT-mode lint for @methodology to drive 100% adoption — REJECTED because it would force cargo-cult tagging (worse than under-tag)
tempting to forecast template+lint → 90%+ adoption based on dual_channel #27's 100% — REJECTED because dual_channel is mechanically detectable; @methodology requires judgment
tempting to propose harness generalization framework — REJECTED per #30 honest_note, premature canonicalization
what_this_design_does_NOT_solve: the 70% zero-pattern majority is largely PRE-formalization (many cycles fired before today); even template+lint cannot retroactively raise their adoption — only NEW cycles benefit
cycle authors who don't know about the methodology spec at all (currently unknown — no telemetry) won't be reached by lint warnings if they never run the lint
federation orchestrator (lint_all.hexa) doesn't exist yet; until it does, each lint must be invoked individually

carry_forward.deliverable: tool/witness_template_emit.hexa (~120 LOC); selftest emits BUILD/AUDIT/OBSERVATION/SIGNALS/DESIGN scaffolds
tool/witness_schema_lint.hexa (~200 LOC); rules from #20 minimum_required_set_v1 + canonicalization_map_v1; warn-level start
EDIT state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md adding (a) canonical verdict enum + ACKNOWLEDGED rules (I3); (b) #7-shape 3-requirement contract (I5)
tool/lint_all.hexa fan-out exec composing all *_lint.hexa siblings; per-#32 design hint
re-fire #30 measurement after 7 days of template+lint to validate forecast bands; expect MT1 P50 60-75%, MT2 P50 12-18%, @methodology P50 50-65%; if forecast misses, root-cause analysis
watch for 2nd-domain harness instance; if observed, promote #7-shape PROVISIONAL → CANONICAL; if not, leave as kick_bench_freshness_smoke-specific tactic per #30

raw_compliance.raw_8_hexa_only: PASS — design-only; no .py/.sh/.rs/.toml; this .json + 1 .md outcome only

atlas_protection.evidence: READ-ONLY: only this witness JSON + state/methodology_adoption_friction_removal_design_spec_2026-04-27.md emitted; no tool/*.hexa modifications; no atlas shard edits other than auto-ingest path

headline: Friction-removal design for 4 methodology patterns measured at 17.5%/2.5%/2.5%/12.5% adoption (#30). 9 friction sources diagnosed across {knowledge, template, enforcement, scope-fit}; 5 interventions specified (2 generators/lints + 1 lint + 2 docs); 3 irreducible-friction ACKNOWLEDGED (MT2 scope-fit, @methodology judgment, synthetic-harness rarity); federation contract shared with #32 dual_channel_trailer_lint + #12 date_n_guard_lint + #25 at_origin/carry_forward sibling proposals; 7-day forecast P50 with template+lint(warn): MT1 60-75%, MT2 12-18%, @methodology 50-65% — none reach 80% canonical threshold within 7d; honest skepticism bands disclosed.
